allow: Bash(npx create-next-app@latest . --typescript --tailwind --app --src-dir --import-alias "@/*" --yes 2>&1)
Bash(rm /c/Dev/nfl-predictor/package-lock.json && npx create-next-app@latest /c/Dev/nfl-predictor --typescript --tailwind --app --src-dir --import-alias "@/*" --yes 2>&1)
Bash(curl -s "https://site.api.espn.com/apis/site/v2/sports/football/nfl/teams" | head -c 500)
Bash(curl -v "https://site.api.espn.com/apis/site/v2/sports/football/nfl/teams" 2>&1 | head -40)

Bash(node -e "fetch\('https://site.api.espn.com/apis/site/v2/sports/football/nfl/teams'\).then\(r => r.json\(\)\).then\(d => console.log\('teams:', d.sports?.[0]?.leagues?.[0]?.teams?.length\)\).catch\(e => console.error\('error:', e.message\)\)" 2>&1)
Bash(curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/sync -H "Authorization: Bearer Liver-pool07" 2>&1)

Bash(node -e "
fetch\('https://site.api.espn.com/apis/site/v2/sports/football/nfl/scoreboard?week=1&season=2026&seasontype=2'\)
  .then\(r => { console.log\('Status:', r.status\); return r.text\(\); }\)
  .then\(t => console.log\('Body:', t.substring\(0, 500\)\)\)
  .catch\(e => console.error\(e\)\);
" 2>&1)

Bash(node -e "
fetch\('https://site.api.espn.com/apis/site/v2/sports/football/nfl/scoreboard?week=1&season=2025&seasontype=2'\)
  .then\(r => { console.log\('Status:', r.status\); return r.json\(\); }\)
  .then\(d => console.log\('Events:', d.events?.length, 'First:', d.events?.[0]?.id\)\)
  .catch\(e => console.error\(e\)\);
" 2>&1)
Bash(tasklist | grep -i node | head -5)
